info.title: Guidance Lines API
info.description: Provides guidance line management within a field context. Management capabilities include creating, retrieving, editing, and archiving lines.

get.summary: View guidance lines for a field
get.description: This endpoint will retrieve a list of guidance lines for a field. By default, the call will return only active guidance lines.
get.note:
Response Details
A collection of GuidanceLine Objects
Please Note: This API does not support eTags.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: The organization owning the guidance lines.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: The field that the guidance lines are associated with.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Whether to include archived guidance lines. Valid values are "archived", "available", or "all". Default is "available".

parameters.name: recordFilter
parameters.description: Filter results based on status; Will default to active

parameters.name: embed
parameters.description: Whether to return the track geometry for AB and Adaptive Curves. See Shapes Array

403.description: The user does not have sufficient privileges to access this resource.

404.description: The specified resource does not exist

post.description: This endpoint will create a guidance line and associate it to a given field. This operation currently only supports the creation of AB Lines.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: The organization owning the guidance lines.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: The field that the guidance lines are associated with.

@type.description: Identifies the subclass of guidance line.

name.description: The common name used by an end user to identify this guidance line.

archived.description: Archived guidance lines will not be available for use in Setup Builder.

tramOffset.description: Defines the number of tram lines in relation to the main track. Valid values are 0 - 20

aPoint.description: The coordinate representing the A point of an AB Line.

bPoint.description: The coordinate representing the B point of an AB Line. Alternatively, the heading can be supplied instead and this value will be calculated by the API.

heading.description: The radial heading for the AB Line (with North being 0 Degrees). You cannot specify both a bPoint and a heading. The omitted value will be calculated.

eastShift.description: The shift in the east direction.

northShift.description: The shift in the north direction.

spatialProjection.description: Spatial Projection used for guidance object. See “dtProjectionType” in the John Deere representation system for possible values.

200.description: Created, with a Location header containing the URI of the newly created resource

message.description: An english description of the error

code.description: A string constant representing the type of error

field.description: The name of the property or parameter deemed invalid

gud.description: A reference to this encounter of the error, for traceability and troubleshooting

invalidValue.description: The value that was supplied for this field in the request

403.description: The user does not have sufficient privileges to access this resource.

404.description: The specified resource does not exist

contentType.description: The request body used to create or update a client

get.description: This endpoint will return the subclass of guidance line represented by the specified ID.

parameters.name: orgId
parameters.description: The organization owning the guidance lines.

parameters.name: fieldId
parameters.description: The field that the guidance lines are associated with.

parameters.name: guidanceLineId
parameters.description: The identifier of this guidance line.

parameters.name: embed
parameters.description: Whether to return the track geometry for AB and Adaptive Curves. See Shapes Array

403.description: The user does not have sufficient privileges to access this resource.

404.description: The specified resource does not exist

put.description: This endpoint will update the GuidanceLines name.

parameters.description: The organization owning the guidance lines.

parameters.name: fieldId

parameters.name: guidanceLineId
parameters.description: The identifier of this guidance line.
